text: Smart YouTube Reader starts with a video URL and turns it into structured local context. It downloads, transcribes, samples frames, removes duplicates, and writes an archive that can be read again without rewatching the whole video.
The reader is the working surface. Chapters, timestamps, transcript text, and evidence images stay together, so a person or external AI agent can ask better questions from grounded context.

The default AI digest workflow can use an external agent with Gemini 3.5 Flash High image generation to inspect the archive and source frames, then produce a concise learning project with novel generated WebP teaching images. This bundled version gives users a Gemini comparison path beside the Codex GPT 5.5 showcase.

Group AI digests merge several completed projects into a new lesson. Repeated ideas are collapsed, contradictions are flagged, unique insights are kept, and exactly three new WebP images teach the combined model.

The global Local and Tailscale mode changes the app origin. Local is for same-machine work. Tailscale opens the dashboard and copied project links through a private 100 dot x address for devices on the same tailnet.
